system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:
Estimado equipo de Meridian Comms,

Gracias por su mensaje y por los detalles adicionales sobre la reparación del UXR0334A.

Hemos recibido su solicitud de actualización de la orden de trabajo con los siguientes elementos:

- Nota a añadir: "Cliente confirma que el problema se reproduce intermitentemente en Ch3 entre 12-15 GHz, no continuo. Adjuntar capturas si es posible."
- Tarea a añadir: "Ejecutar verificación de S-parameters as-found ANTES de cualquier ajuste, para nuestro audit log."

Para poder aplicar correctamente estos cambios, ¿podría confirmarnos el número de orden de trabajo (WO) asociado a la reparación del UXR0334A? Con ese dato procederemos a incorporar la nota y la tarea de verificación as-found al expediente, y le enviaremos confirmación una vez registradas.

Quedamos atentos a su respuesta.

Cordialmente,
Equipo Keysight SalesOps

Return JSON only.
raw_response:
{"translated_text":"Dear Meridian Comms team,

Thank you for your message and for the additional details regarding the repair of the UXR0334A.

We have received your request to update the work order with the following items:

- Note to add: "Customer confirms the issue reproduces intermittently on Ch3 between 12–15 GHz, not continuously. Attach screenshots if possible."
- Task to add: "Run as-found S-parameters verification BEFORE any adjustment, for our audit log."

In order to apply these changes correctly, could you please confirm the work order (WO) number associated with the repair of the UXR0334A? With that information, we will proceed to add the note and the as-found verification task to the file, and we will send you confirmation once they have been recorded.

We look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,
Keysight SalesOps Team","source_language":"es","notes":""}

parsed.translated_text:
Dear Meridian Comms team,

Thank you for your message and for the additional details regarding the repair of the UXR0334A.

We have received your request to update the work order with the following items:

- Note to add: "Customer confirms the issue reproduces intermittently on Ch3 between 12–15 GHz, not continuously. Attach screenshots if possible."
- Task to add: "Run as-found S-parameters verification BEFORE any adjustment, for our audit log."

In order to apply these changes correctly, could you please confirm the work order (WO) number associated with the repair of the UXR0334A? With that information, we will proceed to add the note and the as-found verification task to the file, and we will send you confirmation once they have been recorded.

We look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,
Keysight SalesOps Team
